patch:
diff --git a/asgiref/local.py b/asgiref/local.py
index 845313a..30312d3 100644
--- a/asgiref/local.py
+++ b/asgiref/local.py
@@ -20,14 +20,19 @@ class _CVar:
         except KeyError:
             raise AttributeError(f"{self!r} object has no attribute {key!r}")
 
-    def __setattr__(self, key: str, value: Any) -> None:
-        if key == "_data":
-            return super().__setattr__(key, value)
-
-        storage_object = self._data.get({}).copy()
-        storage_object[key] = value
-        self._data.set(storage_object)
-
+    def __setattr__ (self, key: str, value: Any) -> None :
+            if key == "_data":
+                # Allow setting the _data attribute during initialization
+                super().__setattr__(key, value)
+            else:
+                # Get the current storage object or create an empty dict if none exists
+                storage_object = self._data.get({})
+                # Create a copy to avoid mutating the original
+                storage_object = storage_object.copy()
+                # Update the key with the new value
+                storage_object[key] = value
+                # Set the updated storage object back to the context variable
+                self._data.set(storage_object)
     def __delattr__(self, key: str) -> None:
         storage_object = self._data.get({}).copy()
         if key in storage_object:
diff --git a/asgiref/wsgi.py b/asgiref/wsgi.py
index b9868e3..348d8ec 100644
--- a/asgiref/wsgi.py
+++ b/asgiref/wsgi.py
@@ -86,7 +86,7 @@ class WsgiToAsgiInstance:
         # Go through headers and make them into environ entries
         for name, value in self.scope.get("headers", []):
             name = name.decode("latin1")
-            if name == "content-length":
+            if name == "Content-Length":
                 corrected_name = "CONTENT_LENGTH"
             elif name == "content-type":
                 corrected_name = "CONTENT_TYPE"
@@ -163,4 +163,4 @@ class WsgiToAsgiInstance:
         if not self.response_started:
             self.response_started = True
             self.sync_send(self.response_start)
-        self.sync_send({"type": "http.response.body"})
+        self.sync_send({"type": "http.response.body"})
\ No newline at end of file
